name: Minced Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters.
2. Mince the oysters using scissors.
3. Add seasoning and eggs; cook and stir constantly until it boils.
4. Add cracker crumbs to thicken the mixture.
5. Place in a baking dish and spread butter evenly over the top.
6. Slice through the mixture.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit until browned.
